case_title: NOE VALLEY PARTNERS, LLC VS. LAYERS, LLC

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOE VALLEY PARTNERS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAYERS, LLC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4042 24TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100166268)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 100166268) AS TO DEFENDANT ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100166268) AS TO DEFENDANT LAYERS, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100166268) (TRANSACTION ID # 100166268), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOE VALLEY PARTNERS, LLC SERVED MAY-19-2022, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ** $460.00 PER DAY ** (TRANSACTION ID # 100166268) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOE VALLEY PARTNERS, LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LAYERS, LLC ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOE VALLEY PARTNERS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LAYERS, LLC SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (COMMERCIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOE VALLEY PARTNERS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LAYERS, LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LAYERS, LLC ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100166268), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOE VALLEY PARTNERS, LLC SERVED MAY-19-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAY-19-2022 AS TO DEFENDANT LAYERS, LLC
